message:
refactor(wa-core): modernize pattern matching in degradation module

Apply Rust idiom improvements to the degradation module:

- Combine nested Some() match arms using or-patterns inside a single
  Some() in enter_unavailable() — instead of matching
  Some(Degraded{..}) | Some(Unavailable{..}), use
  Some(Degraded{..} | Unavailable{..}) for cleaner pattern syntax
- Apply the same or-pattern-inside-Some consolidation to is_degraded()
- Replace .map(|dm| dm.read().map(|g| ...).unwrap_or(true)).unwrap_or(true)
  chain in is_operational() with .is_none_or(|dm| dm.read().map_or(true, ...))
  for more idiomatic Option handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
